name: Markdown Link in Form
summary: Add clickable hyperlinks inside a form using markdown HelpContent with `[text](url)` syntax
whenToUse: Linking to external resources, policies, or reference documents
Providing 'Learn more' links within instructional sections
Adding privacy policy or terms-of-service links

help: Please review the [Alberta Privacy Policy](https://www.alberta.ca/privacy-policy) before submitting.

notes: Use standard markdown link syntax: `[link text](url)`
Set `options.markdown` to `true` to enable markdown rendering
Multiple links can appear in the same help entry or across entries
Links open in a new tab by default
The old `variant: hyperlink` approach is deprecated — always use markdown links
